name: image-ocr
title: IMAGE OCR
description: Instantly extract text from screenshots, clipboard images, or local files and copy it directly to your clipboard.
author: rayanhassan

commands.name: snap-text
commands.title: Snap Text
commands.subtitle: Extract text or LaTeX from a screen area
commands.description: Capture a screen area to extract high-precision text or LaTeX math formulas, copying the formatted result to the clipboard.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
